description: Redesigned baseline assessment items v2.1. Adds 3 fields required by accuracy_formula_v2: (1) formula_mode — which of 6 scoring formula modes applies; (2) scope — word_onset | full_word | full_sentence | rate_only | distribution; (3) reference_text — exact text/words the WA and PA align against; (4) wpm_range — ideal WPM range and tolerance for SRS calculation; (5) formula_weights — component weights for SpeechScore calculation; (6) fusion_weights — SpeechScore vs EngagementScore fusion ratio.

response_types.picture_naming: Show image_keyword image. Patient names the object aloud.
response_types.sentence_reading: Show display_content text. Patient reads it aloud.
response_types.word_repetition: Play audio_cue (or show word). Patient repeats exactly.
response_types.minimal_pairs: Show two words. Patient says both clearly with audible contrast.
response_types.syllable_repetition: Show syllable sequence. Patient repeats as fast as possible.
response_types.paragraph_reading: Show multi-sentence passage. Patient reads aloud at natural pace.
response_types.free_description: Show image or prompt. Patient speaks freely for ~60 seconds.
response_types.sequence_recitation: Show sequence prompt. Patient recites numbers/days/months.

scoring_methods.phoneme_accuracy: HuBERT CTC forced alignment — % correct phonemes
scoring_methods.phoneme_contrast_accuracy: HuBERT CTC — both contrast phonemes must be distinct
scoring_methods.fluency_rate_disfluency_count: Whisper ASR — WPM + disfluency count + pause ratio
scoring_methods.speech_rate_wpm_pause_analysis: Praat acoustic — syllable rate, articulation rate, pauses
scoring_methods.word_retrieval_accuracy: Whisper ASR word match — correct name / phonemic cue needed / fail
scoring_methods.verbatim_accuracy_percent: Whisper ASR — % of sentence tokens recalled verbatim
scoring_methods.syllable_stress_accuracy: HuBERT CTC — syllable completeness + stress placement
scoring_methods.prosody_stress_intelligibility: HuBERT CTC + Whisper — phoneme accuracy + stress + WPM
scoring_methods.discourse_coherence_nlp: spaCy NLP — topic, subject, outcome structure scoring
scoring_methods.optimal_production_binary: HuBERT CTC — correct/not correct binary per item
scoring_methods.sequence_accuracy_rate: Whisper ASR — % of sequence items correct + rate

formula_field_guide.formula_mode: Which section-2 scoring formula to apply to this item's audio
formula_field_guide.scope: word_onset=score target phoneme at word start only; full_sentence=score all phonemes; rate_only=no phoneme scoring; distribution=score defect phonemes wherever they occur in free speech
formula_field_guide.reference_text: What Whisper ASR output is aligned against for Word Accuracy (WA). List for word tasks, string for sentence/paragraph, null for free speech
formula_field_guide.wpm_range: Ideal WPM range for Speech Rate Score (SRS). min/max/tolerance from formula Section 1.4
formula_field_guide.formula_weights: Component weights for SpeechScore. PA=phoneme_accuracy, WA=word_accuracy, FS=fluency_score, SRS=speech_rate, CS=confidence_score
formula_field_guide.fusion_weights: How to blend SpeechScore and EngagementScore into FinalScore. From formula Section 4
formula_field_guide.defect_phoneme_focus: For free_description only: which phonemes to monitor based on patient defect codes
